nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Scaled spinetail
nodes.summary: Scaled spinetail（Scaled spinetail，学名 Cranioleuca muelleri），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。
locations: 熱帶和亞熱帶濕潤闊葉林

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the lower Amazon River in Brazil, where it inhabits várzea forests and tropical or subtropical swamplands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The scaled spinetail is endemic to the east Amazon River in Brazil, ranging from extreme eastern Amazonas, eastern to southern Amapá and Mexiana Island in Pará. It inhabits flooded tropical evergreen forest, restricted to the undergrowth and midstory of Brazilian várzea forests (seasonally flooded forests). It ranges from 0–200 m elevation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Based on a model of future deforestation in the Amazon basin, this species is expected to lose about half of its available habitat over three generations. The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in the Amazon basin as land is cleared for cattle ranching and soy production, facilitated by expansion of the road network; it is thought likely to be particularly susceptible to fragmentation and edge effects
